# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-application
version: 0.1.0
description: A Helm chart for deploying our application without resource limits

resources:
  - name: deployment-config
    path: templates/deployment.yaml

---

# templates/deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-application
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-application
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-application
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-application
        image: my-application-image
